title: atylosia latisepala
intro: Atylosia latisepala, also known as the butterfly pea tree, is a plant species in the family Leguminosae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Atylosia latisepala include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Atylosia latisepala may include infusions, teas, or extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
